summary: Frontend-only visual redesign verification for crystality.win-inspired deezlink landing. All review-request requirements verified: animated gradient Get Started button, feature cards with glowing violet icon cubes, all 4 legal routes working, mobile viewport safe.
critical_code_review_comments: Telemetry endpoint returns 401 on every page load, spamming the console with ~15+ errors. Unrelated to this redesign but noisy. Consider suppressing or gating telemetryService.init() behind a feature flag / auth check.

No data-testid on the main hero 'Get Started' CTA. Footer has data-testid='main-footer' but individual footer legal links have none. Recommend adding data-testid to .btn-primary and footer legal <Link> elements for future regression tests.
Landing.js has 632 lines (>700 threshold not yet exceeded, but close). Consider splitting Features/Pricing/Hero sections into subcomponents before it grows further.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crystality.win-inspired redesign verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Desktop screenshot shows (a) hero with pink-violet gradient 'Get Started' button, (b) 2x2 feature card grid with glowing violet cube icons matching reference. Mobile screenshot confirms single-col grid, footer visible, no crash scrolling 6229px. All 4 legal routes return 200 with proper content. Lenis smooth-scroll can be disabled by removing 'lenis'/'lenis-smooth' classes from <html>.

verification_details.landing_page: btn-primary count=4; features section present; 6 .feature-card elements; 6 .feature-card__icon elements; grid class = 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:gap-6'
verification_details.footer_link_clicks: All 3 legal footer links (/conditions, /confidentialite, /remboursement) navigate correctly to destination URL on click

mobile_390x844.bg_orb_secondary_hidden: .bg-orb::after computed display = 'none' (fuchsia orb correctly hidden on mobile)

verification_details.console_errors: 20 errors, all from pre-existing /api/telemetry 401 responses (telemetryService.init). Zero React hydration or component-level errors. Not caused by this redesign.
